themes: App performance & bugs - Lag during trading
quotes: The app freezes often right when I try to place an order.
Takes forever to load the portfolio screen.
Support takes days to reply. Horrible experience.
Bot is useless, I want to talk to a human.
Please add a dark mode, the white screen hurts my eyes at night.
A dark theme would make charts so much easier to read.
actions: Stabilise peak-time performance in order execution flow.
Improve support SLA and add more human agents.
Prioritize shipping a system-wide dark mode toggle.
